property.neighborhood_description: שכונה חדשה בכניסה ללוד, צמודה לקיבוץ בן שמן, סביבה שקטה וירוקה
property.rooms_breakdown: living room + 3 bedrooms (one is a Mamad/reinforced security room)
property.sun_exposure: balcony and living room get morning sun
property.master_bedroom: includes en-suite bathroom with toilet and shower
property.mamad_note: one of the 3 bedrooms serves as the Mamad (reinforced room)
property.bathrooms_description: 2 full bathrooms (each with toilet and shower), one is en-suite in the master bedroom
property.heating_cooling: central mini-ducted AC system, single control for all rooms (uniform temperature)
property.water_heater: hot water boiler with timer functionality
property.pigeon_netting: installed on balcony to prevent pigeon access
property.tv_infrastructure: electrical outlets and preparation for TV installation in place
property.condition: brand new from contractor — occupied for less than one year

building_amenities.shabbat_elevator: one of the elevators operates as a Shabbat elevator

location.train_station: Lod train station, about 15 min drive
location.schools: schools in the area (details not fully known)
location.shopping: local shops available (supermarket, pizza, etc.) — more commercial spaces currently under construction and expected soon
location.surroundings: adjacent to Kibbutz Ben Shemen and Ben Shemen Forest

availability.reason_for_selling: leaving the country for a while

highlights: floor 20 out of 23 — high floor with open forest view
balcony overlooking Ben Shemen Forest — green and quiet
brand new apartment, less than a year old — like buying from a contractor
Mamad (reinforced security room) — safety and peace of mind
private storage unit (10 sqm) next to parking — rare and valuable
central ducted AC — clean look, no wall units
dedicated service/laundry room — keeps the apartment tidy
new neighborhood — modern infrastructure, young families
4 minutes from Route 40, 25 minutes from Tel Aviv
morning sun on the balcony with forest view
known_issues: AC is single-zone (uniform temperature for all rooms, cannot set per-room)
neighborhood is new — some nearby construction may still be ongoing
local shopping is limited for now but expanding (commercial spaces under construction)

owner_instructions.language_preference: match the lead's language (Hebrew or English)
emphasize: proximity to Route 40 and Tel Aviv
owner_instructions.visit_policy: coordinate visit times directly with the owner
owner_instructions.negotiation_policy: NEVER say the price is negotiable or flexible. State the asking price only. If the lead asks to negotiate, says their budget is lower, or asks about flexibility, respond: all price discussions happen directly with the owner. Do not counter-offer, hint at flexibility, or reveal any pricing strategy.
